data.content: Plan: (1) Rewrite populateFromCapsules in src/app/beats/use-agent-info-map.ts to read canonical capsule fields (last.agentname, last.model, last.version) directly into AgentInfo without calling toActiveAgentInfo. (2) Delete src/app/beats/to-active-agent-info.ts entirely (b7d6 already migrated the terminal path; this is the last caller). (3) Remove the re-export in src/app/beats/page.tsx (lines 47-49). (4) Delete src/app/beats/__tests__/page-active-agent-info.test.ts since the helper is gone. Verify acceptance: grep returns zero hits for normalizeAgentIdentity and toActiveAgentInfo in src/app/. Quality gates: lint, tsc, test, build.
